steps.title: Identify the problem Walker was trying to fix
steps.content: The passage identifies a problem—”few formal options” for banking—then shows Maggie Lena Walker took action “to ______ this situation.” The next sentence reveals the outcome: thousands of families gained access to banking services. The blank must express what she did.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the word
steps.content: The target meaning is to correct or fix the banking problem. Rectify means to remedy or set right what's wrong—exactly what Walker did by chartering a bank that provided services to thousands. Prolong, retain, and highlight all fail because they don't capture this corrective action. That matches choice B — B is correct.
